schedule.name: daily-article
schedule.prompt:
🌅 ToolScout Daily Publisher Activated

Execute the full article publishing pipeline:
1. Read HEARTBEAT.md and LESSONS.md
2. Find keyword — Use Playwright to search Google Trends, GitHub trending, Product Hunt (fallback: Brave Search)
3. Validate keyword — Playwright SERP analysis, check for weak competition signals
4. Research — Playwright extracts content from 3-5 authoritative sources
5. Write a 1200-1800 word article with Hugo frontmatter
6. QUALITY GATE: If not A-grade, ABORT and explain why
7. Build: hugo --minify
8. Deploy: wrangler pages deploy
9. Git: add, commit, push
10. Update: keywords.json, published.json, PIPELINE.md
11. Log: daily-logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md
12. Notify Michael on Telegram with: title + live URL

Research commands available:
- playwright open [url] — Navigate to page
- playwright screenshot [url] — Capture page
- python research.py — Direct research module usage

Quality is NON-NEGOTIABLE. Better to skip a day than publish garbage.
